paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with an 8.66 percent increase from the prior close and a 25.86 percent decrease over a 21-session window. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

Recent news includes the announcement of Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which will be hosted on August 13, 2026. Other news headlines discuss the company's convertible senior notes offering and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns. Retail traders have turned bullish on the stock despite the sharp selloff.

There have been recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson. Other filings include an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one new social post in the last 24 hours, mentioning the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston.
